mapper.select: /* InsrMemberMapper.getInsrCntrInfo */ SELECT A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS custNm , A.SUB_STATUS AS subStatus , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS openAgntCd , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS openAgntNm , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS openDt , DVC.DVC_CHG_DT AS dvcChgDt , B.SOC AS insrProdCd , FN_GET_RATENM(B.SOC) AS insrProdNm , B.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS strtDt , B.EXPIRATION_DATE AS endDt , B.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS reqinday , DECODE(DVC.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, MRD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM') AS reqBuyType , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', DECODE(DVC.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, MRD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM')) AS reqBuyTypeNm , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0251', IIM.INSR_STAT_CD) AS intmInsrStatNm , IIM.INSR_PROD_CD AS sbscInsrProdCd , FN_GET_RATENM(IIM.INSR_PROD_CD) AS sbscInsrProdNm , IIM.STRT_DTTM AS sbscInsrStrtDt , IIM.END_DTTM AS sbscInsrEndDt , IIM.MODEL_NM AS insrModelNm , IIM.MODEL_ID AS insrModelId , IIM.INTM_SRL_NO AS insrIntmSrlNo , DECODE(DVC.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, DECODE(MRD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', TRIM(SUBSTR(MRD.FST_MODEL_INFO, 21, 20)), ''), DVC.MODEL_NM) AS trgtModelNm , DECODE(DVC.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, DECODE(MRD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', TRIM(SUBSTR(MRD.FST_MODEL_INFO, 1, 20)), ''), DVC.MODEL_ID) AS trgtModelId , DECODE(DVC.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, DECODE(MRD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', TRIM(SUBSTR(MRD.FST_MODEL_INFO, 41, 30)), ''), DVC.INTM_SRL_NO) AS trgtIntmSrlNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_INTM_INSR_MST C , MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER IIM , ( SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSTR(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS DVC_CHG_DT , B.MODEL_NM , B.MODEL_ID , B.INTM_SRL_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQUEST_KEY IS NOT NULL /* 여러번 기변을 한 경우 최종 값을 조회 */ AND B.APPL_STRT_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(APPL_STRT_DTTM) FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND REQUEST_KEY IS NOT NULL) ) DVC , MSP_REQUEST_DTL MRD WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SOC = C.INSR_PROD_CD AND B.APP_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = IIM.CONTRACT_NUM AND IIM.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = DVC.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = MRD.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS IN ('A', 'S') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchCntrNo}
mapper.insert: /* InsrOrderMapper."regMspIntmInsrOrder" */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER ( CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , IF_TRGT_CD , INSR_STAT_CD , CHN_CD , INSR_EVNT_CD , REQ_BUY_TYPE , DVC_CHG_DT , OPEN_DT , MODEL_NM , MODEL_ID , INTM_SRL_NO , CLAUSE_FLAG , IMG_CHK_YN , VRFY_RSLT_CD , FST_VRFY_DTTM , FST_VRFY_ID , SND_VRFY_DTTM , SND_VRFY_ID , RMK , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , REQ_IN_DAY ) VALUES ( #{contractNum} , #{insrProdCd} , #{strtDt} , #{endDt} , 'Y' , '1' , '3' , DECODE(#{dvcChgDt}, NULL, '1', '2') , #{reqBuyType} , #{dvcChgDt} , #{openDt} , #{trgtModelNm} , #{trgtModelId} , #{trgtIntmSrlNo} , 'Y' , 'Y' , 'FOK' , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId} , NULL , NULL , NULL , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE , #{reqinday} )
